description: CompositionPurple printed sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, with a boat neck, mock button flaps on the shoulder straps, purple piping along the neckline and sleeve hems and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w!
